title: Thoughts on 4/2/23 — empty doc
html:
Thoughts on 4/2/23 — empty doc

Empty Google Doc — title only, no body. Created 2023-04-03 (a "Thoughts and things" placeholder Yahir opened but never filled). Logged for completeness; no extractable content. Catalogued alongside the broader OSU-era "thoughts and things" journaling cadence (cf. 2023 08 02 thoughts and things on 8123 jo breakup, 2023 03 24 thoughts and things 32422).

related.label: Aug 2023 thoughts — the Jo breakup post-mortem (kids, pedicure date, Beef show, Salem trip)
